; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-05-06T23:17:34Z

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        ASSERT tocEntries

        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            property ~&197102514&~ tocCollapsedKeys: ({})
            property ~&197088788&~ _collapseGeneration: 0
        }

        REBUILD tocLoadEntries
            LOCATE AFTER { tocFilterMode = "all"; }
            INSERT {
                tocCollapsedKeys = ({});
                _collapseGeneration++;
            }

            LOCATE AFTER { tocFilterMode = ~&6503736259&~._filterMode || "all"; }
            INSERT {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&214582398184&~.~&233731871973028&~(~&6503736259&~._collapsed)) {
                    ~&214622607920&~ ckeys = ({});
                    ~&6503736259&~._collapsed.~&233727897502049&~(~&180980&~ => { ckeys[~&180980&~] = ~&6504329801&~; });
                    tocCollapsedKeys = ckeys;
                    _collapseGeneration++;
                }
            }
        END REBUILD

        REBUILD tocSaveEntries
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&7082020628281&~.tocWriteEntries(~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~, saveData); }
            INSERT {
                ~&214622607920&~ collapsedArr = ~&7081747777088&~.~&6503992357&~(tocCollapsedKeys);
                ~&5972376&~ (collapsedArr.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) saveData._collapsed = collapsedArr;
            }
        END REBUILD
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[6554413872610298131]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397788359424131273]]#[[15225781669996973588]]
        ASSERT filteredModel

        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            function tocToggleCollapse(~&7083037950451&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ newKeys = ~&7081747777088&~.~&7082472702734&~({}, ~&15793094956877902211&~.tocCollapsedKeys);
                ~&5972376&~ (newKeys[~&7083037950451&~]) {
                    ~&7082573250524&~ newKeys[~&7083037950451&~];
                } ~&6503784146&~ {
                    newKeys[~&7083037950451&~] = ~&6504329801&~;
                }
                ~&15793094956877902211&~.tocCollapsedKeys = newKeys;
                ~&15793094956877902211&~._collapseGeneration++;
                ~&15793094956877902211&~.tocSaveEntries();
            }

            function _tocApplyCollapse(~&214634455770&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ ~&7083121414760&~ = [];
                ~&197102514&~ collapseLevel = Infinity;
                ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&214634455770&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&214624950331&~ = ~&214634455770&~[~&180978&~];
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&214632930081&~ = ~&214624950331&~.~&214632930081&~ ?? 0;
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&214632930081&~ > collapseLevel) ~&7712892661735406&~;
                    collapseLevel = Infinity;
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&484075555528364846&~ = (~&180978&~ + 1 < ~&214634455770&~.~&7082886407723&~) && ((~&214634455770&~[~&180978&~ + 1].~&214632930081&~ ?? 0) > ~&214632930081&~);
                    ~&197102514&~ merged = ~&7081747777088&~.~&7082472702734&~({}, ~&214624950331&~);
                    merged._hasChildren = ~&484075555528364846&~;
                    merged._isCollapsed = ~&484075555528364846&~ && !!~&15793094956877902211&~.tocCollapsedKeys[~&214624950331&~.~&7083037950451&~];
                    ~&7083121414760&~.~&6504189257&~(merged);
                    ~&5972376&~ (merged._isCollapsed) collapseLevel = ~&214632930081&~;
                }
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&7083121414760&~;
            }
        }

        REPLACE filteredModel WITH {
            readonly property ~&197102514&~ filteredModel: ~&15793094956877902211&~._collapseGeneration >= 0 ? _tocApplyCollapse(
                ~&15793094956877902211&~.tocFilterMode === ~&"6504366312&~ ? ~&15793094956877902211&~.~&7713616698729984&~.~&7082656280847&~(~&180974&~ => ~&180974&~.isUserEntry) :
                ~&15793094956877902211&~.tocFilterMode === "native" ? ~&15793094956877902211&~.~&7713616698729984&~.~&7082656280847&~(~&180974&~ => !~&180974&~.isUserEntry) :
                ~&15793094956877902211&~.~&7713616698729984&~
            ) : []
        }

        TRAVERSE [[17555155952404031931]] > [[7711904883727328]]#[[15680802033737085648]]
            TRAVERSE [[254501108490678590]]#tocDelegate > [[254501558939456351]]
                LOCATE BEFORE [[3313440495918644137]]#nameLabel
                INSERT {
                    ~&425121728314878811&~.~&6502767986&~ {
                        ~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785292674113803&~
                        ~&7083172477658&~: ~&254539508423767444&~._isCollapsed ? ~&"7714316831646284314&~ : ~&"4146712889321114420&~
                        ~&6504284228&~: ~&7082020628281&~.~&12414259495892754182&~
                        ~&214622605608&~: ~&7082020628281&~.~&8399340017235344933&~
                        ~&233748328658231&~: !!~&254539508423767444&~._hasChildren

                        ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&233736391113274&~: -8
                            ~&254542236275632405&~: ~&15225781669996973588&~.tocToggleCollapse(tocDelegate.entryPageId)
                        }
                    }
                }
            END TRAVERSE
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
